title: Weekly SAP AI Digest — Week of March 12, 2026
summary: This week in SAP AI: Next‑Gen SAP Ariba Is Here, Announcing the 2026 SAP Partner Awards – Global Winners, SAP Distributed Energy Resources Enables the Energy Flexibility Market and more. Full roundup of Joule, AI Core, Generative AI Hub, and SAP Business AI updates.

title: Next‑Gen SAP Ariba Is Here: Building the Foundation for Intelligent Procurement
summary: SAP Ariba has launched its next-generation platform, leveraging AI for intelligent procurement. This update aims to transform the source-to-pay process.

title: Announcing the 2026 SAP Partner Awards – Global Winners
summary: SAP announces the 2026 Partner Awards, recognizing top-performing partners. Global winners are honored for helping customers achieve their best results.

title: SAP Distributed Energy Resources Enables the Energy Flexibility Market
summary: SAP introduces Distributed Energy Resources to unlock energy flexibility market value. This solution requires more than connectivity, it needs data orchestration to succeed.

title: Strengthening Customer Experience Across the Lead-to-Cash Journey
summary: Companies are integrating customer experience with operational precision across the lead-to-cash journey. This shift matters as it enables businesses to deliver seamless experiences and drive revenue growth.
